outputs.description: list of analysed filename GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.link a link to the analysis in the GLIMPS Malware Expert interface
outputs.name: GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.filenames

outputs.description: Summary of threats found in submission. Each submission file reaching threshold score will add an entry. Entry keys are the SHA256 of files GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.tags Summary of threats found in submission. Each submission file reaching threshold score will add an entry. Entry keys are the SHA256 of files
outputs.name: GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats

outputs.description: highest score given by probes GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.magic file magic - file type
outputs.name: GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.score

outputs.description: string hex encoded input file SHA256 GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.sha1 string hex encoded input file SHA1
outputs.name: GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.sha256

outputs.description: string hex encoded input file MD5 GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.ssdeep string input file SSDeep
outputs.name: GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.md5

outputs.description: input file size (in bytes) GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.mime file mime type
outputs.name: GLIMPS.GDetect.Threats.file_size
